# ci-path-gate before(develop)/after(this PR) — lane booleans for a PR diff
## diff: packages/elizaos/src/scaffold.ts
BEFORE develop   server=false client=false plugins=false desktop=false zero_key=false cloud=false 
AFTER this PR    server=true client=false plugins=false desktop=false zero_key=false cloud=false 

## diff: packages/skills/src/index.ts
BEFORE develop   server=false client=false plugins=false desktop=false zero_key=false cloud=false 
AFTER this PR    server=true client=false plugins=false desktop=false zero_key=false cloud=false

BEFORE develop   server=false client=false plugins=false desktop=false zero_key=false cloud=false 
AFTER this PR    server=true client=false plugins=false desktop=false zero_key=false cloud=false

BEFORE develop   server=false client=false plugins=false desktop=false zero_key=false cloud=false 
AFTER this PR    server=true client=false plugins=false desktop=false zero_key=false cloud=false

BEFORE develop   server=false client=false plugins=false desktop=false zero_key=false cloud=false 
AFTER this PR    server=false client=false plugins=false desktop=false zero_key=false cloud=false
